hook.text: Still in pain after endo surgery? Watch this
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: curiosity and concern about persistent pain despite surgery
hook.target_audience_raw: individuals with endometriosis who have had surgery but still experience pain

main_claim.text: The accuracy of an MRI for endometriosis depends on the radiologist's expertise and interest in the condition; otherwise, they will miss findings.

supporting_explanation.summary: The speaker explains that for an MRI to be useful, the radiologist must have a specific interest in and understanding of endometriosis, otherwise they will miss key signs. This same principle applies to surgery.

funnel_rationale: The video moves beyond broad awareness (TOFU) into a specific diagnostic/treatment nuance—radiologist expertise for MRI interpretation—which assists viewers in seeking correct specialist care.

cta.value_exchange_raw: insight on why MRI quality depends on the radiologist

topic.primary_raw: MRI quality and radiologist expertise for endometriosis

speaker.primary_raw: female speaker (likely a healthcare professional or patient advocate specializing in endometriosis)

format_raw: talking head with onscreen text overlay
